name: Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, sauté onion and celery in margarine for 2 minutes.
3. Add beef and salt, stirring another 2 minutes.
4. Spread half the cabbage into a 2-quart baking dish and cover with half the apples.
5. Layer all the meat mixture on top of the cabbage-apple layer.
6. Add remaining cabbage and apple slices.
7. Cover the dish and bake for 1 hour.
8. Serve with mashed potatoes or noodles, if desired.
